revision.text: [[{{#if:{{{Project|}}}|:{{{Project|}}}}}:User:{{{1|Example Bot}}}|{{{1|Example Bot}}}]] {{toolbar |separator={{{separator|dot}}} |1=[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/{{{1|Example Bot}}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}}}|BRFA]] |2=[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|Example Bot}}}|contribs]] |3=[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=&user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example Bot}}}}}}}}} {{color|#002bb8|actions log}}] |4=[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=block&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example Bot}}}}}}} {{color|#002bb8|block log}}] |5=[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=rights&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example Bot}}}}}}} {{color|#002bb8|flag log}}] |6=[{{fullurl:Special:UserRights/{{{1|Example Bot}}}|user-reason={{urlencode:[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/{{{1|Example Bot}}}|Successful BRFA]]}}}} {{color|#002bb8|user rights}}] }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| (Task: {{{2|}}})|}} {{documentation|content= Usage: {{tlc|botlinks|Example Bot}} Use {{para|2}} if the bot name is followed by a task number. See example. Example: {{botlinks|Legobot|41}} → {{botlinks|Legobot|41}} {{Userspace linking templates}} [[Category:Username internal link templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia bot-related templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Username internal link templates

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: [[{{#if:{{{Project|}}}|:{{{Project|}}}}}:User:{{{1|Example Bot}}}|{{{1|Example Bot}}}]] {{toolbar |separator={{{separator|dot}}} |1=[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/{{{1|Example Bot}}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}}}|BRFA]] |2=[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|Example Bot}}}|contribs]] |3=[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=&user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example Bot}}}}}}}}} {{color|#002bb8|actions log}}] |4=[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=block&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example Bot}}}}}}} {{color|#002bb8|block log}}] |5=[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=rights&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example Bot}}}}}}} {{color|#002bb8|flag log}}] |6=[{{fullurl:Special:UserRights/{{{1|Example Bot}}}|user-reason={{urlencode:[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/{{{1|Example Bot}}}|Successful BRFA]]}}}} {{color|#002bb8|user rights}}] }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| (Task: {{{2|}}})|}} {{documentation|content= Usage: {{tlc|botlinks|Example Bot}} Use {{para|2}} if the bot name is followed by a task number. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Botlinks here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
